doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066

reason: Legal citations (Amendment 4, SB 7066, § 98.0751, Jones v. DeSantis, § 104.011) are accurate, but the document appears to be a synthesized summary rather than a verifiable Florida Division of Elections publication.
